channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: GigaBash DLC ‘Final Ascension’ announced
item.content:encoded:
Passion Republic Games has announced GigaBash downloadable content “Final Ascension,” which adds new playable characters Gaya Gigaman and Zargorah, two new maps, new music, and a new Story Mode chapter. It will launch on March 26.

Here is an overview of the downloadable content, via Passion Republic Games:

New Characters

  • Gaya Gigaman – The Champion of Justice reborn in flames of hope. This legend of the GigaBash world is here to show that an old dog doesn’t need new tricks. He stands with the best, he dispenses with the rest! Like a shooting star, he blitzes across the battlefield to dole out justice against any villain near or far. Gaya Gigaman is the embodiment of heroism, sacrificing even his lifeforce to ensure his foes stay down. Let his azure flame scour the wicked!
  • Zargorah – The harbinger of doomsday. Ferocious, devastating, this Apex Titan is the terror of any arena. He rules the air, the ground, the very Giga Energy that suffuses the land, for all belongs to Cosmic Chaos. Zargorah is a capital-T Threat, whether he’s up close with his raking claws and tail, or afar with his fire breath and apocalypse lasers.

New Story Mode Chapter, New Maps, and New Music

Witness their story unfold in the new Story Mode chapter, an adventure that’s sure to be the defining moment of GigaBash‘s story! Taking place all across the world, including in two new maps set in eye-catching locales, and with new music to boot, the story revolves around the mysterious circumstances of Gigaman’s disappearance and his return in the face of a new threat.

The downloadable content “Final Ascension” is the game’s most ambitious downloadable content to date for the ultimate kaiju fighting game. With a grand total of 28 playable characters, including original and crossover characters from legendary kaiju and tokusatsu history, GigaBash‘s ascension is only just beginning! So, will you don the mantle of hero as Gaya Gigaman to bring hope to the world? Or will you burn it all down with the primordial fury of Zargorah?

GigaBash is available now for PlayStation 5, Xbox Series, PlayStation 4, Xbox One, Switch, and PC via Steam and Epic Games Store.

Watch a new trailer below. View a new set of screenshots at the gallery.

DLC “Final Ascension” Release Date Trailer
